name: LSASS Access From Non System Account
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g
SIGMA Title: LSASS Access From Non System Account
SIGMA Description: Detects potential mimikatz-like tools accessing LSASS from non system account

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID" IN('4663', '4656')) AND ("Access Mask" IN('0x100000', '0x1010', '0x1400', '0x1410', '0x1418', '0x1438', '0x143a', '0x1f0fff', '0x1f1fff', '0x1f2fff', '0x1f3fff', '0x40', '143a', '1f0fff', '1f1fff', '1f2fff', '1f3fff')) AND "Object Type"='Process' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\lsass.exe') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%' OR (LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%:\program files\%' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%:\program files (x86)\%') OR ("Process Name"='C:\Windows\System32\wbem\WmiPrvSE.exe' AND "Access Mask"='0x1410')))) AND (NOT(LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\steamlibrary\steamapps\%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY LSASS Access From Non System Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID" IN('4663', '4656')) AND ("Access Mask" IN('0x100000', '0x1010', '0x1400', '0x1410', '0x1418', '0x1438', '0x143a', '0x1f0fff', '0x1f1fff', '0x1f2fff', '0x1f3fff', '0x40', '143a', '1f0fff', '1f1fff', '1f2fff', '1f3fff')) AND "Object Type"='Process' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\lsass.exe') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%' OR (LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%:\program files\%' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%:\program files (x86)\%') OR ("Process Name"='C:\Windows\System32\wbem\WmiPrvSE.exe' AND "Access Mask"='0x1410')))) AND (NOT(LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\steamlibrary\steamapps\%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: LSASS Access From Non System Account
